prompts.text: An upper body shot from the front, framed from the waist up, with her arms relaxed at her sides in a neutral standing pose. Soft studio lighting illuminates her evenly against a clean background.
An upper body shot at a three-quarter angle, showing her torso and arms in a relaxed pose. Soft directional lighting falls across her figure against a clean background.
An upper body front-view shot with her arms crossed confidently over her chest. Soft studio lighting falls evenly across her figure against a clean background.
An upper body shot from behind, with her head turned slightly to reveal her profile. Soft lighting highlights her shoulders and back against a clean background.
An upper body side-profile shot with her arms relaxed at her sides. Soft rim lighting defines the silhouette of her torso against a clean background.
